title: CRM Development Database
excerpt: Is anyone using the CRM as a development database? If so would love to discuss some best practice on set up and boards. I need some assistance on creating a board that would automate a report to another board but not wit…

posts.author: BrendaV (BrendaV)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anyone using the CRM as a development database? If so would love to discuss some best practice on set up and boards. I need some assistance on creating a board that would automate a report to another board but not with the same columns.

posts.author: bryce-thewell (Bryce K)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! We are just now exploring the donor side of Development, but we have started using the Task Management boards for tracking grants, awards, and applications. Is that what you’re looking into?
